data.title: Step2 Up and Down Roller Coaster Toy for Kids, Ride On Push Car, Indoor, Outdoor Playset, Toddlers Ages 2, 5 Years Old, Compa

features: KIDS ROLLER COASTER: An amusement park right in your home
long 9-foot roller coaster track
ATV-inspired ride-on car
encourages your child to play actively and independently
ACTIVE PLAY: Great outdoor toddler toys for backyard or indoor playrooms
ensuring kids to stay active and entertained all season long
COMPACT STORAGE: Coaster track comes apart
easy to assemble
dimensions: 12.75" H x 110" W x 27" D
* get 4 feet of extra track with the Step2 Farther and Faster Coaster Track Expansion: Second Edition (sold separately)
Not compatible with other extension packs
CHILD DIRECTED LEARNING: Kids can climb steps
board the ride-on car
and the recessed retainer wells hold the car until ready to roll
interactive play helps develop gross motor skills
balance
and hand-eye coordination
DURABLE: Built to last with durable double-walled plastic construction
years of use with colors that won't chip
fade
crack
or peel
low maintenance
easily wipe down dirt
